name: Partners
description_short: Partners Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union founded in 1960, offering checking, savings, lending, and wealth management services with nationwide ATM access through the Co-op network.
description_long:
Partners Federal Credit Union was established in 1960 by The Walt Disney Company Studios employees seeking accessible financial services for creative professionals. The credit union has evolved into a full-service financial institution serving a broad membership base, maintaining its foundational commitment to member-centric banking and financial accessibility. The organization emphasizes its heritage of supporting members through life's major financial decisions and transitions.

Partners offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, auto loans, personal lending, wealth management, and investment services. Members gain access to digital banking platforms with mobile apps, online account management with budgeting tools, credit score tracking, and mobile wallet integration with Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay. The credit union provides educational resources through workshops and webinars covering budgeting, retirement planning, and financial literacy, and operates a Partners Wellbeing Platform for financial education.

The institution distinguishes itself through its exclusive connection to The Walt Disney Company, which provides "a level of quality unsurpassed" according to their website. Partners offers competitive auto loan rates—currently 0.25% APR discount through their Autoland partnership—and provides access to over 30,000 surcharge-free ATMs nationwide plus over 5,000 branch locations through the Co-op shared network. The credit union emphasizes member benefits like paperless enrollment incentives (prize pack giveaways) and positioned itself as a "family" of financial partners serving members throughout their complete financial journey.

As a federally-insured credit union (NCUA), Partners provides the standard safety protections of member-owned institutions. The company maintains physical branch locations and a 24/7 customer service line (800.948.6677). However, specific information about membership eligibility requirements, account fee structures, minimum deposits, and detailed product terms is not fully transparent on the homepage, requiring members to apply online or contact branches directly for complete product specifications.
services: Checking and savings accounts (share accounts and share certificates)
Auto loans with promotional rate discounts through Autoland
Online and mobile banking with budgeting tools and credit score tracking
Mobile wallet integration (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay)
Direct deposit switching support and Spanish-language banking
Fraud center and account security resources
Partners Wellbeing Platform for financial education
pros: Access to 30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs nationwide and 5,000+ branch locations through Co-op network
Founded in 1960 with established 60+ year track record serving members
Exclusive affiliation with The Walt Disney Company providing quality assurances
Competitive auto loan rates with current 0.25% APR discount through Autoland partnership
Comprehensive digital banking with mobile app, budgeting tools, and credit score tracking
Financial literacy resources including webinars, workshops, and dedicated Wellbeing Platform
Mobile wallet integration supporting Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly stated on primary website pages
Limited transparency on account fees, minimum deposits, and specific product terms on homepage
No specific APR ranges or lending terms clearly disclosed for personal or mortgage products
Annual meeting attendance required in-person at Grand Central Air Terminal or via livestream (limited accessibility for dispersed membership)
Website content incomplete on 'Who We Are' page (cuts off mid-sentence regarding Disney connection)
best_for: Current and former Disney Studios employees and their families seeking member-owned banking
Members prioritizing nationwide ATM access and branch network convenience
Individuals seeking comprehensive financial planning and wealth management services
Consumers interested in competitive auto loan rates and digital-first banking platforms
diagnosis: Partners Federal Credit Union is best for Disney-affiliated employees and their families, or individuals seeking a full-service credit union with extensive ATM/branch access and competitive auto lending rates. The main caveat is that membership eligibility criteria and detailed product terms/fees are not transparent on the public website, requiring direct contact for complete information before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Partners — Credit Union in Burbank, CA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Partners — NCUA-insured credit union in Burbank, CA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
